channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Lindsey’s Graham’s journey from a pool hall to the heights of political power
item.description: Lindsey Graham was the garrulous son of South Carolina pool hall owners and he rose to become a prominent senator and fixture on the global stage.

item.title: From staunch critic to fierce ally: Graham’s long, strange and consequential friendship with Trump
Innovation, data fixes fuel Native American graduation gains at federally funded schools
